title: COVID-19 Heroes Bonuses paid to employees
summary: At YKHC, our vision is clear: Through Native self-determination and culturally relevant healthcare systems, we strive to be the healthiest people. title: Alaska Eskimo Whaling Commission Hiring
summary: The AEWC is hiring two positions to support the Backyard Buoys project, a Program Coordinator and a Village Facilitator. title: League Leads Rally to Stop Willow in Washington, D.C.
summary: On January 10, Alaska Wilderness League led environmental, Indigenous, and climate activists at a rally outside the White House calling on the Biden Administration to reject the proposed Willow oil development in Alaska’s western Arctic. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 12, 2023
summary: January 12, 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase and at a bit greater rate than last week, of 2.93% , from the level on 01/05/2023 of 12.841 M km 2 to 13.229 M km 2 for this week. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 9 January, 2023
